title: eulophia scripta
intro: Eulophia scripta, also known as the Scrolled Eulophia or Snake Lily, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Eulophia scripta are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's extracts are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
